briefs.title: BC Scraps Old Credit Union Deposit Guarantee Rules — What This Means for Your Money
briefs.summary: BC has repealed (cancelled and removed) the Credit Union Deposit Guarantee Regulation, a rule that set out how deposits at BC credit unions were guaranteed (protected if the credit union failed). This change took effect October 27, 2025, and likely means deposit protection rules are now handled under updated or replacement legislation.
briefs.action_required: Check with your BC credit union to confirm your deposits are still protected under the new rules.
